unit.name: WP_Http request proxy/safety option behavior
unit.area: src/wp-includes/class-wp-http.php with WP_HTTP_Proxy, WP_HTTP_Requests_Hooks, WP_HTTP_Requests_Response, WP_HTTP_Response, and WP_Http_Cookie support
unit.public_contract: This fixture executes copied WordPress 7.0 WP_Http request proxy and URL-safety option branches in isolated PHP CLI probes. It observes reject_unsafe_urls filtering, URL validation, bad-protocol stripping, redirect validation hook registration, proxy option/auth handoff, proxy bypass hosts, and pre_http_send_through_proxy overrides through a deterministic Requests boundary without claiming live Requests network I/O, real DNS/proxy/TLS behavior, transport execution, installed distribution behavior, or generated public PHP ownership.

bridge.removal_gate: Replace copied public PHP with generated original-path adapters and pass request proxy/safety, selected upstream HTTP PHPUnit, installed distribution, and live/recorded network/proxy parity gates before claiming public PHP ownership.
